title: pact.auth
description: Canonical wire schema for the pact.auth Kafka topic, mirroring internal/kafka/producer.go AuthEvent. Field names and required/optional status are frozen - pact-notify and pact-account pin this shape. additionalProperties is false at the top level so an accidental field rename or addition fails validation instead of silently passing through unrecognised.
$comment: PACT-515 removed the raw wire auth token from this event. There is deliberately no top-level 'token' property, and one must never be reintroduced: a leaked or over-retained pact.auth topic would otherwise hand out live, usable credentials. token_id is the non-secret auth_tokens row id; the notification consumer exchanges it for the wire token at render time via AuthService.GetEmailToken, so the secret only ever exists in-memory on pact-auth and pact-notify, never at rest in Kafka or a consumer's audit log.

event_uuid.description: Autopopulated by pact-auth's EnqueueEvent when the caller leaves it empty; used by downstream consumers as the dedup key.

event_id.description: Closed set - pact-auth's internal/kafka/producer.go Evt* constants (this module's auth.Evt* constants) only ever produce these ten values.

provider.description: OAuth provider name (e.g. google, github). Open set - pact-auth can register a new OAuth provider without a schema change. Absent on password-flow events.

email.description: Email + password flow field. Only set on relevant events (email_verification_requested / password_*_link_requested / etc.).

token_id.description: The non-secret auth_tokens row id, not the wire token itself (PACT-515). See this schema's top-level $comment.

method.description: Closed set - mirrors pact-auth's producer.go inline comment ("password" | "oauth"); this module's auth.MethodPassword / auth.MethodOAuth constants.

display_name.description: Profile seed value captured at sign-up (or first OAuth login). Set on register_succeeded so pact-account can materialise the profile row with useful initial values; absent on every other event.

avatar_url.description: Profile seed value, same population rule as display_name.
